texto: There is no shortcut to confidence building
autor: it is a process that involves succeeding at something challenging. One needs to consciously work on every aspect of confidence building whether for one's own benefit or the benefit of others.
explicacao: Citação de it is a process that involves succeeding at something challenging. One needs to consciously work on every aspect of confidence building whether for one's own benefit or the benefit of others. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “There is no shortcut to confidence building” articula reflexao, vishwas-chavan, there em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
